description: Composition Printed blue top made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves, a spread collar with a V-neckline, half buttoned placket, ruffles along the placket, a patch pocket on the left chest and flaring pintucks at the yoke at the back Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron; do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery wrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish top references the vintage era with its print while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and ballet flats. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
